AboutHalter
At Halter,we're on a mission to enable farmers and graziers to run the most productive
and sustainable operations.Ourcustomers areusing Haltertobreakfreefrom the time-
intensive constraints of conventionalpractices.Imaginewatching 5oO cattle standup and
walk calmly towards their next break?No quad bikes, no dogs, no fences. Just a group of
cattle walking at their own pace.People say it looks like magic. Our customers are
revolutionizing grazing with Halter. It's changing lives and transforming an industry.
problems within a talented team and a culturebuilt for highperformance.Ourteam out-
think, out-work and out-care. We're committed to delivering real change in the world -
this isn'teasy,and in truth,welove that it'shard.

Abouttherole
We're looking fora Software Engineering Manager who builds and elevates their team,
drives strong technical solutions, and goes deep on hard,real-world problems.This isn't a
pure delivery orpure people role.You'llbe in thework,shaping technical direction,
collaborating closely with design and product, and helping your team do the best work of
their careers. Don't worry, you'll also be hands-on.
You'll need to hold the technical bar high while creating the space for others to grow.
We're solvingproblems that haven't beensolved before,and you'll becrucialtofiguring
them out. It's a role that demands absolute ownership, someone who can take a blurry
problem,createclarity,andleadateamtonailit.
Thekindofproblemsourteamssolve
Halter is one system: hardware, software, and Al,running live on real farms. Our
engineeringteamsowndifferentslicesofthatsystem,buttheproblemsallrhyme:
·Turning thousands of collars and billions of sensor events into a single, calm decision in
afarmer'shand.
·Modelling the physical world(animals,pasture,terrain) accurately enough to act on in
real time.
·Building mobile and web experiences that hold up at 5am whilst out in a paddock in
the rain.
·Designing platforms and pipelines that scale with our incredible pace of growth
withouttheseamsshowing.
·Engineering against constrained hardware,flakyrural connectivity,and themessiness
Everyteamhereshipssoftware thathastoworkinapaddock,not justabrowsertab.As
an engineering manager at Halter, you're in the work, not above it: coaching engineers,
Engineering Manager-Software
Apply C
Every team here ships software that has to work in a paddock,not just a browser tab.As
anengineeringmanageratHalter,you'reinthework,not aboveit:coaching engineers,
shaping thetechnicalbets,andwritingcode.
Whatyou'll do
·Lead a team of engineers - frontend and backend - supporting their growth, giving
great feedback,and helping them focus on what matters.
·Own the technical direction and delivery of your team's work - making sure it's reliable,
maintainable, and impactful. Help define the structure, shape, and scope of our work -
andensureit landswell withfarmers andranchers.
·Stay close to the technical details - across services, data, and system design - and
bring a strong point of view.
·You'll be backing engineering-led initiatives and getting ahead of scale.
·Work closely with product and design to shape what we build, not just how. You'll be in
theroom whenrequirements arefuzzy and you'll helpmake them clear.
·Back engineering-led initiatives and lookforopportunities touse Al tools to accelerate
development or unlock entirely new ways of working.
·Get out onfarm.Deep domainknowledgematters and you'llbe expected to develop
it.
·Contribute to the broader engineering culture and practices that make Haltera great
place to build.
You'll be great if you
·Think like aproductengineer.Youcare aboutwhatgetsbuilt and the impact it has on
theperson holding thephonein thepaddock.
·Have a strong intuition for UX, performance, and product polish.You know what good
feels like and you push forit.
·Know how to shape and structure work without being overlyprescriptive,and balance
speed with quality.
complexwork.
·You've worked in fast-moving startups, seen growth, and tackled ambiguous problem
spaces.
